title: Critical alert routed to Slack only — missed page on real incident
code_snippet:
# Alertmanager config
route:
  receiver: slack-team
  routes:
    - match:
        severity: critical
      receiver: slack-team
    - match:
        severity: warning
      receiver: slack-team
expected_feedback: Critical: Both critical and warning alerts route to the same Slack channel. Critical alerts (service down, SLO burn rate exceeded) must page on-call via PagerDuty or OpsGenie with escalation policy. Slack messages get buried in channel noise — the on-call may not see a critical alert for hours. Fix: route critical severity to PagerDuty receiver with acknowledgment + escalation, warning to Slack, info to dashboard only.
